code:
%% Effort Status Workflow
%% State machine for status transitions

stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> Draft: Create asset

    Draft --> Backlog: Move to Backlog
    Draft --> Trashed: Trash

    Backlog --> Draft: Move to Draft
    Backlog --> Analysis: Move to Analysis
    Backlog --> Doing: Start (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
    Backlog --> Trashed: Trash

    Analysis --> Backlog: Move to Backlog
    Analysis --> ToDo: Move to ToDo
    Analysis --> Trashed: Trash

    ToDo --> Analysis: Move to Analysis
    ToDo --> Doing: Start
    ToDo --> Trashed: Trash

    Doing --> Backlog: Move to Backlog (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
    Doing --> ToDo: Move to ToDo (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
    Doing --> Done: Mark Done
    Doing --> Trashed: Trash

    Done --> Doing: Reopen
    Done --> Trashed: Trash

    Trashed --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]: Terminal state

    note right of Draft
        Initial state
        No timestamps
    end note

    note right of Doing
        Sets: ems__Effort_startTimestamp
        On exit: ems__Effort_endTimestamp
    end note

    note right of Done
        Sets: ems__Effort_resolutionTimestamp
        Completion state
    end note

    note right of Trashed
        Terminal state
        Can't transition further
        Archived but kept for audit
    end note
repo_description: Cognitive infrastructure augmenting human intelligence through semantic knowledge organization, SPARQL queries, ontology-driven reasoning, and AI integration. Obsidian plugin + CLI + Core library.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为IoT工业设备的工作量状态设计一个完整的工作流。核心是从ActuatorController创建资产开始，进入Draft状态，然后可以走向Backlog或者直接废弃。关键是要体现EdgeNode和PLC Logic在状态推进中的作用。
明白了，起点是ActuatorController触发Create asset到Draft。我想确认一下：Backlog和Draft之间是双向流动的吗？还有，从Backlog进入实际执行状态时，是不是需要EdgeNode来触发Start？
对的，Backlog可以退回Draft，也可以前进。但进入Doing之前我们加了一个Analysis中间层，从Backlog先到Analysis，再到ToDo，最后才能Start进入Doing。EdgeNode只在Backlog到Doing的Start环节出现，PLC Logic则是在Doing回退时用到。
好的，我先把主干画出来：Draft分叉到Backlog和Trashed，Backlog走向Analysis，Analysis再到ToDo，ToDo进入Doing，Doing可以Mark Done。同时保留了各个状态回退和废弃的路径。
还需要加上时间戳的语义。Doing状态要记录ems__Effort_startTimestamp，退出时写ems__Effort_endTimestamp。Done状态要设置ems__Effort_resolutionTimestamp。另外Trashed是终态，指向EdgeNode作为终止。
确认一下Trashed的处理：它是终态，不能再流转出去，但保留审计用途。还有，Doing回退到Backlog用PLC Logic，回退到ToDo用ActuatorController，这个设备角色的分配没错吧？
没错，就是那个对应关系。Draft作为初始态没有timestamp，Trashed指向EdgeNode表示流程终止。所有note都加上去吧，特别是Doing和Done的时间戳说明，还有Trashed的终态特性。
全部完成了。Draft、Doing、Done、Trashed四个关键状态都加了右侧注释。状态流转也都标注了触发条件，设备角色和timestamp语义都体现在图里了。
很好，这个状态机覆盖了从资产创建到完成或废弃的全生命周期，EdgeNode和PLC Logic的触发点也清晰了。可以定稿。
